_comment: Template for .cursor/mcp.json (gitignored). Copy this file to .cursor/mcp.json and fill in servers. Secrets via env only. User-level ~/.cursor/mcp.json should hold cross-repo tools; project keys live here. Examples below are opt-in — copy from _examples into mcpServers to enable.

fff-mcp._comment: Optional fast file search — https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff . Install fff-mcp binary; on Windows often %LOCALAPPDATA%\fff-mcp\bin\fff-mcp.exe
